articles.title: 西班牙队终结法国队连续第三次闯入世界杯决赛
articles.summary: 周二，在德克萨斯州阿灵顿举行的世界杯半决赛中，西班牙队以 2-0 击败法国队，取得了对欧洲重量级对手的三连胜。
articles.originalTitle: Spain end France's bid for 3rd-straight WC final
articles.originalSummary: Spain beat France 2-0 in their FIFA World Cup semifinal in Arlington, Texas, on Tuesday to make it three wins in a row against their European heavyweight rival.

articles.title: 德尚：法国队不足以击败西班牙
articles.summary: 法国队主教练德尚表示，在世界杯半决赛中，法国队0-2负于西班牙队，法国队技术上不够健全。
articles.originalTitle: Deschamps: France not good enough to beat Spain
articles.originalSummary: France head coach Didier Deschamps said his team wasn't technically sound enough in his team's 2-0 loss to Spain in the FIFA World Cup semifinals.

articles.title: 马特·弗里斯：美国国家队的批评“伤害了我的心”
articles.summary: 美国国家队门将马特·弗里斯表示，在 16 强赛中以 4-1 输给比利时后，他因 2026 年世界杯被淘汰而感到受伤。
articles.originalTitle: Matt Freese: USMNT criticism 'hurts my heart'
articles.originalSummary: USMNT goalkeeper Matt Freese said he felt hurt by the backlash following the elimination from the 2026 World Cup after losing 4-1 to Belgium in the round of 16.

articles.title: 巴洛贡：红牌“争议”影响了美国国家队

articles.originalSummary: United States striker Folarin Balogun revealed that he predicted President Donald Trump's involvement in overturning his World Cup suspension would "cause a lot of controversy."

articles.originalSummary: A complaint alleging FIFA president Gianni Infantino has breached rules on political neutrality in his dealings with President Donald Trump has been submitted to the International Olympic Committee.
